name: io.github.cmendezs/mcp-fattura-elettronica-it
title: Fattura Elettronica Italia
description: MCP server for Italian e-invoicing compliance. Generates and validates electronic invoices in FatturaPA XML format (SDI / Agenzia delle Entrate). 21 tools covering invoice structure, VAT codes, document types TD01–TD28, XSD validation, and SDI filename generation. Apache 2.0.
